use std::fs::File;
use std::os::unix::io::AsRawFd;

struct Connection {
    fd: libc::c_int,
}

impl Connection {
    fn new(file: &File) -> Self {
        Connection { fd: file.as_raw_fd() }
    }

    fn send(&self, data: &[u8]) -> isize {
        unsafe {
            libc::write(self.fd, data.as_ptr() as *const libc::c_void, data.len())
        }
    }
}

fn make_conn(path: &str) -> Connection {
    let file = File::open(path).unwrap();
    Connection::new(&file)
}
